title: geum triflorum f. ornatum
intro: Geum triflorum f. ornatum, commonly known as the Prairie Smilax or Three-flowered Avens, is a flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geum triflorum f. ornatum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and ease digestive issues. Geum triflorum f. ornatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
